tier: Tier 7.6a - Long-Horizon Planning / Subgoal Control Contract
claim: Tier 7.6a locks the bounded long-horizon planning/subgoal-control contract before implementation or scoring: task families, splits, baselines, shams, metrics, leakage guards, pass/fail gates, nonclaims, and expected artifacts are predeclared.
caveat: Contract evidence only; not planning performance, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
